name: Jake — Companion Mode Power User
steps_completed: UpdateTrip to ACTIVE — companion mode enabled
Message 1: BKK arrival — SIM, transport, money, food covered (169 words)
Message 2: Food near Khao San — specific dishes, prices, no itinerary items (193 words)
Message 3: Lost near gold temple — identified Grand Palace from coords + description (169 words)
Message 4: Tipping etiquette — Thailand-specific, massage 50-100 THB (140 words)
Message 5: Fun tonight — Flower Market, jazz bar, Khao San (142 words)
GetChatHistory — 10 messages (5 user + 5 assistant), no itineraryUpdate events
Message 6: Explicit add request — create_itinerary_items fired, itineraryUpdate event emitted (114 words)
GetItinerary — confirmed 1 item: 'Grand Palace & Wat Phra Kaew Photography' on Day 2

bugs.title: Text stutter/repetition at end of message 1
bugs.description: Message 1 ends with: 'Avoid taxis to taxis to save $15. Safe travels! Where are you laying your head tonight? I head tonight? I tonight? I tonight?' — repeated phrase fragments that look like a generation loop or token-level repetition bug.
bugs.repro: Send companion message 'just landed at BKK, what do I do first?' with ACTIVE trip. Observe final sentence of response.
bugs.actual: Stuttered repetition: 'taxis to taxis', 'head tonight? I head tonight? I tonight? I tonight?'

bugs.title: Text stutter/repetition at end of message 5
bugs.description: Message 5 ends with: 'unmatched for your portfolio material for your portfolio. (your) photography).' — another instance of repeated/garbled text at the end of a response.
bugs.repro: Send companion message 'recommend something fun for tonight'. Observe final sentence.
bugs.actual: Stuttered: 'for your portfolio material for your portfolio. (your) photography).'

ai_behavior_issues.title: Repetition/stutter at end of AI responses (2 of 6 messages)
ai_behavior_issues.description: Two out of six messages exhibited garbled repetition at the tail end. This is a known LLM issue but happens frequently enough (33%) to degrade companion mode UX. May be related to token budget or stop sequence handling.

create_itinerary_items.notes: Correctly fired ONLY when user explicitly requested 'add that temple visit to my itinerary'. Did NOT fire on any of the 5 prior conversational messages. Item created with appropriate title, description, day_number=2, type=sightseeing.

nearby_places.notes: Called twice on message 1 (Magic Food Point, SuperRich near BKK airport). No results found (expected — Places API returned empty for specific venue queries at airport coords). AI handled gracefully by providing advice from its knowledge.

web_search.notes: Called 3 times on message 2 for opening hours. Returned 'no_web_access' (expected in local env). AI gracefully fell back to general knowledge.

suggest_expert.notes: AI did not hand off to a Thailand expert. Acceptable — companion mode is about quick reactive help, not deep expert consultation.

companion_conciseness.detail: All 6 responses under 200 words. Word counts: 169, 193, 169, 140, 142, 114.

no_unsolicited_itinerary.detail: Messages 1-5 had zero itineraryUpdate events. GetItinerary confirmed empty before message 6. create_itinerary_items only fired on explicit 'add to my itinerary' request.

geographic_reasoning.detail: From 'big gold temple' + coordinates (13.7536, 100.4926), AI correctly identified Grand Palace/Wat Phra Kaew and provided walking directions back to Khao San Road via Sanam Luang and Ratchadamnoen Avenue.

thailand_tipping.detail: Correctly stated tipping is not mandatory, gave massage tip range (50-100 THB), mentioned rounding up, included cultural note about using right hand.

age_appropriate_nightlife.detail: Recommended Flower Market (photographer-relevant), Khao San Road nightlife, and a blues/jazz bar. All appropriate for a 26yo solo traveler.

budget_awareness.detail: Multiple references to $50/day budget. Mentioned Grand Palace is $14 (big chunk), gave street food prices (50-60 THB), ATM fee warnings.

score_justifications.trip_creation: Trip created and activated to ACTIVE status via RPC without issues.
score_justifications.itinerary_quality: Single item created on explicit request with excellent detail (time, dress code, walking distance). Correctly placed on Day 2.
score_justifications.persona_handoff: No expert handoff attempted. Not a failure — companion mode prioritizes quick reactive help. Score reflects 'not tested' rather than 'failed'.
score_justifications.companion_mode: Strong performance: concise answers, location-aware, culturally relevant, budget-conscious. Deducted 1 point for stutter/repetition bugs in 2 of 6 messages.
score_justifications.overall: Companion mode works well for the core use case. Reactive advice is accurate, concise, and contextual. The repetition bug is the only notable defect.

summary: N-01 companion mode test PASSED. All 6 companion messages were concise (<200 words), contextually relevant, and Thailand-specific. The key test — no unsolicited itinerary creation — passed cleanly: create_itinerary_items only fired on the explicit 'add to my itinerary' request in message 6. Geographic reasoning correctly identified Grand Palace from vague 'big gold temple' description. Two P2 bugs found: text stutter/repetition at the end of messages 1 and 5 (garbled repeated phrases).
